capabilities.reason: The product repo keeps the host shell, renderer bootstrap, and debug host exposure.

capabilities.capability: core scene graph and object identity
capabilities.reason: NexusEngine core owns reusable scene graph, object identity, and scene recipes.
NexusEngine core owns input intent. Product code should only bind keyboard/touch into that intent.

capabilities.currentProductOwner: updateRun lane, speed, jump, coyote, buffer, lean state
capabilities.reason: No existing kit owns lane jump controller state directly.
Core motion should carry generic motion descriptors after run-movement-kit computes controller state.
Core camera owns target, follow, FOV, and shake descriptors.
Core skybox owns sky preset and sky render descriptors. Product rendering should consume descriptors only.

capabilities.currentProductOwner: Canvas draw calls and local visual decisions
capabilities.reason: Core graphics owns renderer-facing descriptors and material/lighting/VFX descriptors.
Core animation should own animation pose descriptors once movement emits animation phase.

capabilities.currentProductOwner: HUD DOM text and button state
capabilities.reason: Core UI should carry menu/result descriptors; product host may still render DOM.
Diagnostics should prove failed imports, missing manifests, and rejected kit state.
Core composition owns installed kit graph and dependency/provides maps.

capabilities.capability: track route shape and forward constraints
capabilities.reason: The track is a constrained forward route.

capabilities.currentProductOwner: updateRun speed ramp and spawn difficulty
capabilities.reason: Speed ramp and pacing budget match race/arcade flow.
Bone, fern, log, and rock obstacles are lane hazards, not a unique architecture.
Dino hitting obstacles is contact resolution.
ProtoKits already lists flock agents as a family.
Palms, ferns, rocks, fossils, and background props should be placed by environment kits.
Near, mid, far, static, and interactive readability are render-layer concerns.

capabilities.currentProductOwner: distance, shards, near misses, best distance
capabilities.reason: Keep tiny product score state until it proves reusable.
Use core scene or sequence flow first; only create run-scene-flow-kit if sequences are not enough.
Keep the renderer host product-side until adapter code becomes large enough to justify three-runner-adapter-kit.
